info.title: ServiceBusManagementClient
info.description: Azure Service Bus client for managing Namespace

ApiVersionParameter.name: api-version
ApiVersionParameter.description: The API version to use for this operation.

SubscriptionIdParameter.name: subscriptionId
SubscriptionIdParameter.description: Subscription credentials that uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.

ResourceGroupNameParameter.name: resourceGroupName
ResourceGroupNameParameter.description: The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

value.description: Result of the List Namespace operation.

nextLink.description: Link to the next set of results. Not empty if Value contains incomplete list of Namespaces.

SBNamespaceListResult.description: The response of the List Namespace operation.

minimumTlsVersion.description: The minimum TLS version for the cluster to support, e.g. '1.2'

createdAt.description: The time the namespace was created

updatedAt.description: The time the namespace was updated.

serviceBusEndpoint.description: Endpoint you can use to perform Service Bus operations.

zoneRedundant.description: This property reflects if zone redundancy has been enabled for namespaces in regions that support availability zones.

disableLocalAuth.description: This property disables SAS authentication for the Service Bus namespace.

publicNetworkAccess.description: This determines if traffic is allowed over public network. By default it is enabled.

premiumMessagingPartitions.description: The number of partitions of a Service Bus namespace. This property is only applicable to Premium SKU namespaces. The default value is 1 and possible values are 1, 2 and 4

createdAt.description: The time the namespace was created

updatedAt.description: The time the namespace was updated.

serviceBusEndpoint.description: Endpoint you can use to perform Service Bus operations.

disableLocalAuth.description: This property disables SAS authentication for the Service Bus namespace.

tier.description: The billing tier of this particular SKU.

capacity.description: Messaging units for your service bus premium namespace. Valid capacities are {1, 2, 4, 8, 16} multiples of your properties.premiumMessagingPartitions setting. For example, If properties.premiumMessagingPartitions is 1 then possible capacity values are 1, 2, 4, 8, and 16. If properties.premiumMessagingPartitions is 4 then possible capacity values are 4, 8, 16, 32 and 64

Identity.description: Properties to configure User Assigned Identities for Bring your Own Keys

principalId.description: Principal Id of user assigned identity

clientId.description: Client Id of user assigned identity

keySource.description: Enumerates the possible value of keySource for Encryption

keyName.description: Name of the Key from KeyVault

PrivateEndpointConnectionProperties.description: Properties of the private endpoint connection resource.

provisioningState.description: Provisioning state of the Private Endpoint Connection.

id.description: The ARM identifier for Private Endpoint.

PrivateEndpointConnectionListResult.description: Result of the list of all private endpoint connections operation.

value.description: A collection of private endpoint connection resources.

nextLink.description: A link for the next page of private endpoint connection resources.

PrivateLinkResource.description: Information of the private link resource.

id.description: Fully qualified identifier of the resource.

PrivateLinkResourcesListResult.description: Result of the List private link resources operation.

value.description: A collection of private link resources

nextLink.description: A link for the next page of private link resources.

userAssignedIdentity.description: ARM ID of user Identity selected for encryption

ErrorAdditionalInfo.description: The resource management error additional info.

Resource.description: The Resource definition for other than namespace.

location.description: The Geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

ProxyResource.title: Resource
ProxyResource.description: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.EventHub/Namespaces" or "Microsoft.EventHub/Namespaces/EventHubs"

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives
